title: デビュー戦の後に・背水の陣

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Grass Wonder seems to have made a strong
impression in her debut race!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: I'm back, Trainer. Are you still feeling nervous?

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. Wonderful. ♪ The first step has been
taken... yes?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After packing up our things to head back, we step
outside only to be immediately approached by a
waiting figure.

text_block_list.name: Reporter A
text_block_list.text:
Excuse me, Grass Wonder! May I ask you a few
quick questions?

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Oh, certainly. Go right ahead.

text_block_list.name: Reporter A
text_block_list.text:
Thank you! Then let me start by congratulating
you!

text_block_list.name: Reporter A
text_block_list.text:
You displayed amazing potential in your debut
race! Your running was a sight to behold!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: I'm honored to receive such praise.

text_block_list.name: Reporter A
text_block_list.text: Oh, trust me, I've still got goosebumps!

text_block_list.name: Reporter A
text_block_list.text:
It's no wonder they call you the next
Maruzensky—you really are the Beast's Successor!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: ...Thank you.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Though the reporter's eyes are alight with
excitement, I feel like they're seeing too much of
Maruzensky and not enough of Grass Wonder.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Grass Wonder herself must be feeling this
dissonance even more acutely.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Allow me.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I try to step in, but Grass Wonder cuts me off.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Too excited to notice the tension in the air, the
reporter tries to press onward with the interview.

text_block_list.name: Reporter A
text_block_list.text: So, what's in your racing schedule going forward?

text_block_list.name: Reporter A
text_block_list.text:
If you have anything planned, I'd love to know
what race we'll be seeing you in next!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Oh yes, I was just about to discuss that very topic
with my trainer.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: So then, Trainer, is now a good time?
choice_data_list: Do you have a race in mind?
Do you have a race in mind?

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Yes, my heart is set on one in particular.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Allow me to race in the Asahi Hai Futurity Stakes.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The Asahi Hai F.S. is well-known to determine the
top junior-year runner, so it sounds like a perfect
objective for her.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: But there's just one problem...

text_block_list.name: Reporter A
text_block_list.text:
Did I hear that right?! The Asahi Hai F.S.?!
That's...

text_block_list.name: Reporter A
text_block_list.text:
That's the race where Maruzensky set a new
record back in her junior year!

text_block_list.name: Reporter A
text_block_list.text: And now you want to run in it next?!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Yes, so long as I receive my trainer's permission.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As long as it wouldn't put unreasonable strain on
her schedule, I'd intended to approve any race
she might name.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: But this...

text_block_list.name: Reporter A
text_block_list.text:
Now this is a scoop! "The Successor Aims for the
Junior Crown!" Yep, this going on the front page!

text_block_list.name: Reporter A
text_block_list.text:
Thank you so much for your time and the big
news! Goodbye!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Hehe. Please be careful on your way home.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Now then... just to make sure.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Trainer, may I set the Asahi Hai F.S. as my next
race goal?
choice_data_list: Are you sure this is what you want?
Are you sure this is what you want?

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: What do you mean?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Maruzensky's performance in the Asahi Hai F.S.
left a mark on the racing world that still burns
vividly.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
People are already calling Grass Wonder the next
Maruzensky. If she makes this her next big race...
choice_data_list: It'll invite more comparison than ever.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: ...I know.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: That's exactly why I have to enter.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
The nickname has already spread, so there's no
escaping it now.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Besides, I have no intention of running from it
anyhow.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Bring on the comparisons, I say. I'll take this
chance to prove myself once and for all.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: My running is one of a kind.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: So... I'll ask one more time.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Do I have your permission to run in the Asahi Hai
F.S.?
choice_data_list: Let's show the world what you can do!
Let's show the world what you can do!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Thank you.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Then let's begin training right away. ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And with that, Grass Wonder's next goal is
decided: the Asahi Hai Futurity Stakes!
